localisation.title: 99 Nama Cinta (RCTI)
localisation.subtitle: Amid countless prayers, an unexpected name is written. Two worlds, a forced promise, and the 99 Names guide their path. Can coercion turn into sincere acceptance?

localisation.title: Love In Disguise
localisation.subtitle: Rio goes undercover as an elite student to expose a drug ring he believes is led by Jenna, a popular campus leader. As he gets closer, he discovers her hidden struggle. The truth reveals a greater threat, forcing them to choose trust or suspicion.

localisation.title: MotoGP 2026: Red Bull Grand Prix of The U.S - Free Practice 1
localisation.subtitle: The opening session sees riders begin adapting to the demanding Circuit of the Americas. Top contenders showcase early pace, with teams focusing on bike setup, tire performance, and race strategy to gain a competitive edge.

localisation.title: Piknik Pesona
localisation.subtitle: Pesona Picnic seeks to describe the hope of humans to reunite and celebrate togetherness in a future filled with freedom. A collection of short films that document the stories full of charm and variety of people in their efforts to celebrate cultural diversity.

localisation.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
localisation.subtitle: The Turtles get into another battle with their enemy the Shredder, who has acquired new allies: the mutant thugs Bebop and Rocksteady and the alien being Krang.

localisation.title: Sweet 20
localisation.subtitle: Adapted from Korean movie, Miss Granny, this movie tells a story of old woman that despise old-age that suddenly transform to a pretty girl with all her youth problems.

localisation.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
localisation.subtitle: Six CIA operatives defend the U.S. consulate in Benghazi, Libya, during a terrorist attack. Their bravery is put to the ultimate test as they fight for survival.

localisation.title: Bol
localisation.subtitle: A religious Muslim family refuses to accept their transgender son, which creates a conflict within the family and ends up tearing them apart.
